text.title: Stakeholder Engagement Advanced Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to operate the differentiated plan.

step.name: assess-delta
step.action: For every entry with current != desired, scope a plan slot.

step.name: choose-strategy
step.action: Write strategy referencing observable behaviours per stakeholder.

step.name: set-indicators
step.action: Attach ≥2 measurable indicators with baseline, target, evidence source.
step.decision-gate: Reject < 2 indicators or missing evidence source.

step.name: execute
step.action: Run cadence engagements; record signals + indicator updates per cycle.

step.name: diff
step.action: Run engagement_diff.py; if regression found, escalate to sponsor in next status.
step.decision-gate: Status report blocked when diff absent.
